prompt: Create a dark cinematic photorealistic rural science-fiction scene in a vertical 4:5 composition. In the foreground, a small young girl stands centered with her back to the viewer on a muddy dirt road, looking toward the horizon; she has dark brown hair in a loose braid, wears a gray knitted sweater, a deep red patterned skirt, black tights, and worn dark boots. The road curves slightly uphill through dry brown grass and scrub. On the left midground sits one small old stone cottage with rough gray masonry walls, a red clay-tile roof, a chimney, a dark wooden door, one small window, and a low stone wall, with one leafless tree beside it. On the right background towers one colossal ancient robot, about ten times taller than the cottage, humanoid and weathered, made of dark corroded metal plates with exposed cables hanging from its joints, bulky shoulders, long heavy arms, thick legs, a skull-like circular-eyed head, and a thin antenna spike on top; it stands motionless in mist, facing the girl. The atmosphere is ominous and post-apocalyptic, with heavy charcoal storm clouds filling most of the sky, dramatic diffused light breaking through cloud gaps, muted earthy colors, high contrast, gritty texture, realistic depth, low horizon, wide-angle cinematic perspective, moody film grading, no text, no borders.
